What We Offer

Everything you need,
nothing you don't.

  • Quick Inspections
  • Honest assessments (No scare tactics)
  • Insurance claim support & documentation
  • Timely, high-quality repairs & replacements
  • Licensed & Insured
  • 20+ years of experience
How It Works

Five steps. Zero stress.
You just pick the color.

1
Roof Inspection
We come to you. Thorough roof inspection identifying damage invisible from the ground.
2
Policy Review
We review your homeowner's policy and determine exactly what qualifies for a claim.
3
Adjuster Meeting
We attend the insurance adjuster meeting with you and advocate for full coverage.
4
Approval & Install
Once approved, we manage the full installation from material selection to final cleanup.
5
See Your Coverage
After the adjuster approval, we handle the full installation. Fill out the form to find out what your policy covers.

What Homeowners Say

5 stars across Yelp & Google

★★★★★
"We hired Cal State Roofing to help replace my elderly aunt's damaged roof. After interviewing several roofing companies I will say that they were the most kind and patient answering all of our questions and thoroughly explaining the process of working with insurance. The work was done quickly and efficiently and the whole process was a breeze. The owner even came out afterwards to double check everything and gave my aunt his personal number in case she had any issues. I am very happy that we chose to go with them. Thank you Cal State Roofing."
Erikka C.

Why We Exist

We built this company for one reason.

Too many SFV homeowners were paying for roofs their insurance should have covered. That stops with us.

We are insurance claims specialists first, roofers second. Every homeowner we work with gets a dedicated claims specialist who attends the adjuster meeting, fights for full coverage, and manages the installation from start to finish. We never charge for an inspection. We never pressure you to file.
